extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports By the Company: 3 criminal and 3 material civil matters, which are excluded, while Against the Company reports Nil criminal, 6 tax, 1 statutory/regulatory and 1 material civil matter; all director, promoter, KMP and senior-management against rows are Nil, so the counted against rows are criminal 0, regulatory 1 and tax 6. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹100.77 million; since no subsidiary row or separate group total is disclosed, this company-only against amount is used and converted to ₹10.077 crore, excluding all By the Company matters. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated Total of ₹101.71 million as at March 31, 2025, converted to ₹10.171 crore rather than resummed. The top-five and top-ten percentages are for customer concentration within the sale-of-gases business and use revenue from sale of gases, related products and services for Fiscal 2025, not company-wide revenue from operations, so they are not extracted. The source tables use ₹ million; conversion is ₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore.
